title: Raw, Refreshing Mediterranean Octopus Salad
description: A raw, refreshing salad featuring tender octopus, pomegranate molasses, and crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: cured octopus
ingredients.notes: Find cured octopus at most specialty or deli stores.

ingredients.name: mixed heirloom tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Use the freshest, most colorful tomatoes available.

ingredients.name: red onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice the onion for best texture.

ingredients.name: pomegranate molasses
ingredients.notes: This sweet and tangy sauce is key to the dish.

ingredients.name: fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Chop the parsley finely for best texture.

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed lemon juice is essential.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, extra-virgin olive oil.

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: Use flaky sea salt for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground black pepper is always best.

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic finely for best flavor.

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the cured octopus, mixed heirloom tomatoes, red onion, and chopped parsley.
Drizzle the pomegranate molasses over the salad and toss gently to coat.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the salad and toss again to combine.
Drizzle the olive oil over the salad and toss gently to coat.
Season the salad with salt and black pepper to taste.
Mince the garlic and mix it into the salad.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good toss and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
